description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a before_script with `haxe -version` and `make prepare` for all jobs. Define a single stage called test. Add two jobs, `test-3.1` and `test-3.4`, both in the test stage, each using the Docker image `demurgos/haxe` pinned to the SHA256 digests `d032db4b811a984291011f556a6a17d3807a879e9ff50295a0fb3013814e269a` and `674a9005e88da195e6c4dd8d6e783463ec4b2824b23235d579349e209a6debf6` respectively, and each runs the script `make test`. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
